createAutomation.title: Create automation

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.emptyDescription: Employee activity, conversations and knowledge updates will appear here.

aiEmployees.title: AI Employees
aiEmployees.description: Create and manage digital AI Employees for your business.
aiEmployees.emptyDescription: Build a digital employee that can answer customers, use your business knowledge and work across connected channels.

aiEmployeeCreate.title: Create AI Employee
aiEmployeeCreate.description: Set up the core identity and communication style of your new digital employee.

basicInformation.title: Basic information
basicInformation.description: Define who this AI Employee is and what role they perform.

communication.title: Communication
communication.description: Choose the default language and tone used in customer conversations.

name.label: Name
name.hint: Use a clear and recognizable name.

role.label: Role
role.hint: Describe the employee's primary business role.

description.label: Primary goal
description.placeholder: Describe what this AI Employee should help customers accomplish...
description.hint: You will add detailed instructions after creating the employee.
